title: Add Two Numbers
description: Write a function add(a, b) that returns the sum.

title: Square a Number
description: Write a function square(n) that returns n squared.

title: Check Even
description: Write a function is_even(n) that returns True if n is even.

title: Find Maximum
description: Write a function find_max(lst) that returns the largest number.

title: Subtract Two Numbers
description: Write a function subtract(a, b) that returns a minus b.

title: Multiply Two Numbers
description: Write a function multiply(a, b) that returns the product.

title: Check Odd
description: Write a function is_odd(n) that returns True if n is odd.

title: Find Minimum
description: Write a function find_min(lst) that returns the smallest number.

title: String Length
description: Write a function string_length(s) that returns the length of the string.

title: Reverse String
description: Write a function reverse_string(s) that returns the reversed string.

title: Count List Items
description: Write a function count_items(lst) that returns the number of items in the list.

title: Sum List
description: Write a function sum_list(lst) that returns the sum of all numbers in the list.

title: Check Positive
description: Write a function is_positive(n) that returns True if n is greater than 0.

title: Convert to Uppercase
description: Write a function to_upper(s) that returns the string in uppercase.

title: Count Vowels
description: Write a function count_vowels(s) that returns the number of vowels in a string.

title: Palindrome Check
description: Write a function is_palindrome(s) that returns True if the string reads the same forwards and backwards.

title: Factorial
description: Write a function factorial(n) that returns n!.

title: Fibonacci Number
description: Write a function fibonacci(n) that returns the nth Fibonacci number.

title: Prime Number Check
description: Write a function is_prime(n) that returns True if n is prime.

title: Remove Duplicates
description: Write a function remove_duplicates(lst) that removes duplicate values while preserving order.

title: Second Largest Number
description: Write a function second_largest(lst) that returns the second largest unique number.

title: Word Frequency
description: Write a function word_frequency(words) that returns a dictionary of word counts.

title: Binary Search
description: Write a function binary_search(lst, target) that returns the index of target or -1 if not found.

title: Merge Sorted Lists
description: Write a function merge_sorted(a, b) that merges two sorted lists into one sorted list.

title: Balanced Parentheses
description: Write a function is_balanced(s) that checks whether parentheses are balanced.

title: Longest Common Prefix
description: Write a function longest_common_prefix(words) that returns the longest shared prefix.

title: Recursive Sum
description: Write a recursive function recursive_sum(lst) that returns the sum of all numbers in a list.

title: Anagram Check
description: Write a function is_anagram(a, b) that returns True if the strings are anagrams.

title: Two Sum
description: Write a function two_sum(nums, target) that returns indices of two numbers that add up to target.

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Write a function longest_unique_substring(s) that returns the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.
